name: Noise-Robust Box-Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection via Physics-Inspired Soft Label Optimization
summary: arXiv:2607.17148v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) commonly relies on pixel-level mask supervision. Such annotations, however, are costly and inherently uncer...
description: arXiv:2607.17148v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) commonly relies on pixel-level mask supervision. Such annotations, however, are costly and inherently uncertain because infrared targets have blurred boundaries and weak textures. We formulate box-supervised IRSTD as a problem distinct from generic box-to-mask segmentation and point-supervised IRSTD. Its c...
author: Xizhe Zhang, Fan Shi, Mianzhao Wang, Jiangpeng Zheng, Xu Cheng, Shengyong Chen
